S.text: Toric soft CL fitting (follow-up from exam); bilateral astigmatism; standard lenses insufficient for cylinder.

O.text: Refraction OD: -2.25 -1.50 x 090 (cylinder initially misspoken '-1.70' then corrected to -1.50).
Trial toric lens: base curve 8.7 mm, diameter 14.5 mm OU.
Fit OD: good centration/coverage; orientation marker stable at 6 o'clock, ~5 deg rotation on blink with recovery (acceptable).
Fit OS: good coverage; marker rotating ~10 deg, settling nasally (axis compensation planned).
Over-refraction OD: -0.25 improves from ~20/25 to 20/20; OS 20/20 already.

A.text: Toric soft CL fit OU; OD stable axis, OS lens rotation requiring axis compensation.

P.text: Prescribe toric soft CL: OD -2.25 -1.50 x 090; OS -1.75 -1.25 with axis adjusted to 105 (from 100) to compensate nasal rotation.
Base curve 8.7 mm, diameter 14.5 mm OU.
One-week follow-up to confirm stability with all-day wear.
Tech to handle training and lens ordering.
